'''Doran Sarkin-Tainer''' was the son of [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Tyria Sarkin Tainer|Tyria Sarkin]] and [[Wraith Squadron]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] [[Kell Tainer]]. He was named after Kell's original family name, Doran. He was handsome and square-jawed, and described as "the size of a dwarf Wookiee.".

==Biography==
===Early Life===
Prior to and during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], Tyria wandered [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] with her son, teaching him the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] while her husband Kell worked with the Wraiths. Doran and his parents joined the other [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] on [[Zonama Sekot/Legends|Zonama Sekot]] at the end of the Yuuzhan Vong War.

===Second Galactic Civil War===
During the [[Second Galactic Civil War]], Doran was one of the Jedi Knights involved in the [[Operation Roundabout|attempted kidnapping]] of [[Thrackan Sal-Solo]] from his mansion on [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]], as part of [[Team Tauntaun]] alongside [[Tahiri Veila]] and [[Tiu Zax]]. They infiltrated the mansion disguised as utility workers, but discovered it was a trap, with dozens of guards, combat probots, and [[YVH 1]] droids guarding the room where Sal-Solo was supposed to be. Veila ordered a withdrawal, but Doran came up with the idea that they could disguise a [[Protocol droid/Legends|Protocol droid]] as a dead Jedi, allowing one of them to remain behind and gather information. Zax pointed out he was too large for the task, and volunteered to do so instead. After preparing the droid, Doran and Veila carried it out of Sal-Solo's mansion and hijacked a groundspeeder, heading to the [[Behareh Spaceport]] to meet up with [[Team Purella]].<ref name="Betrayal" />

Upon arriving, Doran reassured [[Jaina Solo Fel|Jaina Solo]] that the body in the back was not what it looked like, and explained the situation to her, guessing that they had been ambushed as well judging by the injuries several of the other Jedi had. Jaina was annoyed about leaving a team member behind, but decided that it was good to get information from Sal-Solo's home. She ordered Doran to get [[Bacta/Legends|Bacta]] patches for [[Zekk]]'s burns and something to help [[Kolir Hu'lya]]'s injured mouth, while [[Thann Mithric]] secured a vehicle for them to escape in. Mithric secured a shuttle, and Doran and the other Jedi escaped the planet after being escorted by [[Hardpoint Squadron]].<ref name="Betrayal" />

===Rising tensions===
In [[43 ABY]], Doran was one of several Jedi brought in to keep the media and [[Galactic Alliance Security]] at bay during the apprehension of [[Valin Horn]], arriving with [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Kyp Durron]] to help secure the [[Force psychosis|psychotic]] Jedi.<ref name="Outcast">''[[Fate of the Jedi: Outcast]]''</ref> In [[44 ABY]], Doran participated in the [[Raid on Detention Center 81|rescue attempt]] of Valin and [[Jysella Horn]]. He and [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Padawan/Legends|Apprentice]] [[Bandy Geffer]] piloted an [[Airspeeder/Legends|airspeeder]] disguised as a [[HoloNet News/Legends|HoloNet News]] vehicle to help extract "Team Saav'etu", "Team Solo", and the Horn siblings.<ref name="Vortex">''[[Fate of the Jedi: Vortex]]''</ref>

==Personality and traits==
Doran seemed to have inherited his father's tendency for risky and unorthodox ideas.

==Powers and abilities==
Doran, as a Jedi, could [[Force power/Legends|manipulate]] [[The Force/Legends|the Force]].<ref name="Outcast" />
